# TDD Dashboard Architecture Understanding

**Session:** 1
**Date:** December 24, 2025
**Project:** APR Dashboard v3/v4
**Agent:** Marcel Superagent
**Status:** ✅ Complete - Architecture Clarified

---

## 🎯 Session Purpose

Clarify TDD Dashboard tab structure by reviewing Claude Desktop extraction agent session outputs and validating understanding of:
- S1/S2/S3 consolidated input areas vs. numbered report tabs
- Single source of truth pattern
- Field population and deduplication logic
- "Managed Elsewhere" pattern

---

## 📊 Key Discoveries

### 1. TDD Architecture is TWO SEPARATE SYSTEMS

**S-TABS (Consolidated Input):**
- S1 - CLIENT INTAKE (V3)
- S2 - LOE PREP (V3)
- S3 - IMAGE MANAGEMENT

**NUMBERED REPORT TABS (01-22):**
- 01-COVER PAGE, 02-INTRODUCTION LETTER, 04-IDENTIFICATION OF ASSIGNMENT, etc.
- These are the ACTUAL report sections
- S-tab data POPULATES INTO these tabs

**Critical Insight:** S-tabs are NOT nested inside numbered tabs. They are separate consolidated input areas that feed into the report structure.

### 2. S3 - IMAGE MANAGEMENT Has Internal Structure

S3 contains subsections organized by destination:
- S3-01 - COVER & SIGNATURE
- S3-03 - LOCATION MAPS
- S3-07 - PROPERTY PHOTOGRAPHS
- S3-08 - SUBJECT PHOTOS
- S3-09 - SALES COMP PHOTOS
- S3-10 - SALES COMP MAPS
- S3-11 - RENTAL COMP PHOTOS

These subsections map to numbered tabs where images appear (tab 03 gets images from S3-03, tab 18 gets images from S3-09, etc.).

### 3. THE LOGIC: Single Source of Truth

**Why S2 (LOE PREP) fields populate to tabs 01 and 22:**

```
S2 - LOE PREP (Letter of Engagement Prep)
├── Appraiser name, credentials, email, AIC
├── Job number, valuation date, report date, delivery date
├── Financial terms, report scope, special instructions
│
└── Populates to:
    ├── Tab 01 - COVER PAGE
    │   ├── appraiser-name
    │   ├── appraiser-credentials
    │   ├── valuation-date
    │   └── report-date
    │
    └── Tab 22 - CERTIFICATION
        ├── appraiser-name
        ├── appraiser-credentials
        ├── certification-date
        └── appraiser-signature
```

**Why this works:**
1. Appraiser enters info ONCE in S2 (during job setup from V3)
2. Same info needed on COVER (who's doing this) and CERTIFICATION (who's certifying this)
3. Prevents duplicate entry, typos, inconsistencies
4. Single source of truth: Edit appraiser name in S2, updates everywhere

**The V3 Connection:**
- **(V3)** = Data comes from previous system's job intake workflow
- S1 = Client submits request
- S2 = Appraiser accepts job and sets up engagement (LOE = Letter of Engagement)
- Then actual appraisal work (tabs 01-22)

### 4. "Managed Elsewhere" Pattern

**In TDD Dashboard:**
```
Tab 01 - COVER PAGE
  appraiser-name: "🔗 Managed in S2 - LOE Prep" [clickable link]
  cover-photo: "🔗 Managed in S3 - Image Management" [clickable link]
```

**Purpose:**
- Shows user the field exists in context
- Links to consolidated input location
- Prevents duplicate entry across 20+ tabs
- User enters data ONCE, sees it referenced everywhere

**In Editor Panel (contextual editing):**
```
Tab 01 - COVER PAGE (Split Panel)
  appraiser-name: [directly editable field]
  cover-photo: [directly editable field]
```

No "Managed Elsewhere" links in Editor because:
- No S-tabs in Editor
- All fields are directly editable in context
- User sees field + rendered output simultaneously

### 5. Tab Numbering Has Intentional Gaps

**Numbered tabs present:** 01, 02, 04, 05, 06, 08, 09, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22

**Missing (hidden/consolidated):**
- 03 - Location Maps (consolidated into S3 image management)
- 07 - Property Photographs (consolidated into S3 image management)
- 17 - Cost Approach (consolidated into 15 - Valuations)
- 19 - Income Approach (consolidated into 15 - Valuations)

**Why gaps?**
- Consolidation prevents redundant tab structure
- Related content grouped logically (all approaches in 15)
- All images managed in S3 instead of scattered across tabs

## 🔍 Claude Desktop Extraction Agent Discoveries

Found comprehensive documentation from Claude Desktop session (Claude Desktop-Reg.03):

**New Information (v2.3.0):**
- Field consolidation: Removed `intake-*` and `loe-*` prefixes
- Canonical field naming: `client-first-name` instead of `intake-client-first-name`
- 1,687 fields in registry (not 924 as previously documented)
- HUMAN-INPUT-TEST-DATA.json: 774 user-input-only fields (ready for calc engine testing)

**Files Generated by Extraction Agent:**
- APR-DASHBOARD-EXPORT-INDEX.md - Master index of all outputs
- TDD-DASHBOARD-TAB-ARCHITECTURE.md - Detailed tab structure
- FIELD-NAMING-CONVENTION-CLEAN.md - Field consolidation guide
- SPLIT-PANEL-EDITOR-UX.md - Editor Panel workflow documentation
- VALCRE_TABLE_FIELD_MAPPING.md - Complete field crosswalk

## 🎓 Understanding Verified

**User confirmed I understand:**
✅ S1/S2/S3 are separate from numbered tabs (not nested)
✅ S1 fields populate into report tabs (01, 02, etc.)
✅ S2 fields populate into tabs 01 and 22 specifically
✅ S3 has subsections that map to image destinations in report tabs
✅ Single source of truth pattern prevents duplicate entry
✅ "Managed Elsewhere" pattern used in TDD, not in Editor Panel
✅ Tab numbering has intentional gaps for consolidation

---
